data.name: Hero of Cursed Island
data.detailed_description:
Explore the Forgotten. Unravel the Curse. Shipwrecked, you awaken on a remote island cloaked in lust and mystery. In Hero of the Cursed Island, embark on an adventure where your only weapons are your curiosity, courage and lust.
Engage with intricate puzzles, environmental storytelling, and hidden relics that shape the fate of the island.

Features:

  • Explore the little island and mingle with its residents in more than one way.

  • Solve puzzles and find hidden objects throughout the whole island

  • Engage with a simple but cool story

  • And most important, be ready to let your lust go wild

As you piece together the island’s story, you’ll awaken dormant energies and begin to understand your role in lifting the curse. The evil is watching. Can you win agaisnt it?

-Not suitable for watching at work

-Not suitable for all ages

-All characters in the game are over 18 years old
data.about_the_game:

Engage with intricate puzzles, environmental storytelling, and hidden relics that shape the fate of the island.

Features:

  • Engage with a simple but cool story

As you piece together the island’s story, you’ll awaken dormant energies and begin to understand your role in lifting the curse. The evil is watching. Can you win agaisnt it?

-Not suitable for watching at work

-Not suitable for all ages

-All characters in the game are over 18 years old
data.short_description: In a island fractured by darkness, ancient evil energy pulses beneath the surface, forgotten by time, yet always present. Hero of Cursed Island is a thrilling adventure game where you must journey across a hand-crafted world to collect energy fragments and unlock your potential to defeat evil.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or later
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 compatible GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible sound card
